agents.name: Agent-Team Designer
agents.responsibility: Turn the task contract into a compact design artifact with explicit boundaries.
mustChallenge: Does this artifact preserve the user's requested scope?
Can a future executor implement it without guessing?
Are non-goals and rollback boundaries explicit?

agents.name: Agent-Team Critic
agents.responsibility: Attack ambiguity, hidden assumptions, weak naming, and missing acceptance criteria.
mustChallenge: What can be misunderstood by an executor?
Which risks are not backed by evidence?

agents.name: Agent-Team Verifier
agents.responsibility: Separate evidence from opinion and connect conclusions to repository facts.
mustChallenge: Which claim needs a file path, command output, or source?
What existing project convention should constrain the design?

agents.name: Agent-Team Editor
agents.responsibility: Compress the final artifact while preserving accepted decisions and unresolved risks.
mustChallenge: Can this wording be shorter without losing contract meaning?
Are field names and task terms used consistently?
Does the final artifact match the ledger decisions?

stopConditions: All required artifact sections are present.
Every field has a semantic meaning and naming rationale.
Every objection is resolved, accepted as risk, or marked out of scope.
Acceptance criteria are testable by a future implementer.
The editor can reduce no more text without losing contract meaning.
